dialog_history.content: Hello, how can I help you?
My side hurt. It hurt so much here. Why am I here?

I am very sorry to hear you are in so much pain; I am here to help you get to the bottom of this. Could you please point to exactly where in your side you are feeling the pain, and tell me when it first started?
Right side. Hurt bad. Four days maybe? My head feel funny.

I’m concerned that you’ve been dealing with this for four days now, and I want to make sure we address that "funny" feeling in your head as well. To help me understand what might be happening, do you have any fever, chills, or have you noticed any changes in your bowel or bladder habits since this started?
I have hot and cold. Very bad. I not know about... the other thing. Why I here?

I understand you're feeling quite unwell with those fevers and chills, and we are here to provide you with the care you need to start feeling better. To help me narrow down what is going on, could you tell me if you have any known allergies to medications or if you take any daily pills for your health?
I sorry. I have bad skin if I take... white pill? I forget name. I take some for my blood, maybe?

Thank you for sharing that with me; please don't worry, we will take great care of you and look into your records to identify that medication. Based on your symptoms of pain, fever, chills, and feeling unwell, I have a few things in mind that we need to investigate further.

[DDX] 
1. Pyelonephritis (kidney infection)
2. Cholecystitis (gallbladder inflammation)
3. Appendicitis
4. Urosepsis
5. Diverticulitis
